title: Nike Pro Universe
description: Adds Nike Pro Universe to Minecraft. Adds new bosses, items and new dimension.
body:
Mod requires geckolib!

# Currently available:

## > Bosses:
1. Nike Pro
2. Lazer Nike Pro
## > Food:
1. Lentil Soup 
    - Applies the effect of strength, speed and resistance to you.
## > Effects:
1. Motivation
    - Gives you armor, armor toughness, and knockback resistance.
## > Potions:
1. Potion of Motivation
    - Gives you a motivation effect for 3 minutes
## > Armor:
1. Nike Pro Armor
## > Weapon:
1. Microphone
    - Applies negative effects to the target.
## > Music Disc:
1. You can fly
## > Items:
1. Twix
   - Gives experience when pressed.
## > Blocks:
1. Kcas
   - When pressed, creates a powerful explosion.
